positive: A sophisticated, stylized illustration featuring a forest fox curled up within a giant, ethereal moon flower. The fox is rendered in warm, earthy tones (sienna, ochre, deep burnt orange), contrasting sharply against the flower petals and night sky (deep indigo, midnight sapphire). Minimalist silhouette style with heavy linework and negative space. The composition is perfectly centered and designed for symmetrical placement on apparel. Highly detailed magical realism, Art Nouveau influence, deep depth of field, volumetric lighting, cinematic, high contrast black and white elements overlaid on color.
negative: blur, low detail, artifact, text, watermark, noisy, messy lines, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, signature, logo, trademark, copyright, ugly, distracting background clutter
